notes: All Phase 1 foundation tasks complete. Schema finalized with MessageRole/SyncStatus enums and Float[] embeddings. DB helpers created for sessions/messages/repos/documents. System prompt helpers added. Note: npx prisma migrate deploy requires a running PostgreSQL database; migration SQL file is ready but could not be applied in this sandbox environment. npx prisma generate succeeded and Prisma client types are up to date.
